title: Ruby Hall Clinic is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ruby Hall Clinic is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic:
Ruby Hall Clinic is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
